2231043.title: 1999 MTV Movie Awards
2231043.extract: The 1999 MTV Movie Awards were hosted by Lisa Kudrow. Musical performances included Kid Rock, Robbie Williams, and Will Smith with Dru Hill, Nine Inch Nails and Kool Moe Dee. The winners were announced on Saturday, June 5, 1999 at the Barker Hangar in Santa Monica, California, airing on MTV.
